reviews.review_description: This is a very innovative game. The graphics are really neat and the premise of the game is fun. I really enjoyed playing it until I got to the boss ghost at the end. because I’m not good at shooting and dodging it takes me several times before I can get past a boss. Since I had to restart the mission from the beginning and collect all the energy each time, after three times I just had to not finish yet. It would be nice if I could restart that mission from outside the boss’s door. Other than that, it was fun.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words and the constructive feedback! We're very glad you found the game fun and innovative. Your suggestion about adding a checkpoint before the boss is a great point, and it is definitely among the potential changes we are looking into. We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience with us!

reviews.review_description:
First off, it's a treat to have a game with Quest 3 support right from launch. It's rare to see a flashlight on the Quest that actually casts shadows, (although Affected: The Manor accomplished that on Quest 2 years ago).

The art direction is nice and the music and sound effects fit the Ghostbusters mood well.

The ghost hunting gadget is well designed and fun to use.

$5 is a great price to get a look at this new game! I'm looking forward to playing the other three missions and to seeing how full version turns out.

My only complaints so far after finishing the first mission:

1. There are items marked with icons for pickup everywhere but nearly all of them do nothing when you pick them up.  It made for a confusing start to the game.

2. The environments are nicely rendered but despite all the tagged objects they feel sparse somehow.

3. Gathering energy got a little boring.

4. The graphics are very nice for the most part but the proton streams look out of place. They're flat textures which makes them really stand out.

5. Returning to the office was briefly disorienting since it put me facing backwards at the desk. It seems like the game wasn't tested with natural turning.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for such a thorough and thoughtful review! We're really glad to hear your feedback — it's what helps us grow and make InvestiGhost better.

We're a team of just 3 — one programmer, one artist, and one level designer — so detailed feedback like yours is incredibly valuable to us.

You raised some interesting points.
Interactive objects are actually marked with a green icon, while non-essential ones have a red icon, but we take note of the confusion and will look into making it clearer.
As for the environments, keep in mind these are abandoned locations by design, but your input is definitely appreciated.
We're also looking into ways to improve the drainer beam.
The natural turning orientation will be fixed in an upcoming update!

We're currently gathering feedback from the community and planning a patch that will include bug fixes and new content, all while keeping frame rate optimization in mind.

Stay tuned on our channel for updates. Thanks again for taking the time — players like you make Early Access worth it!

reviews.review_description: Can’t get past 3rd part caus for some reason keeps stalling  and if left on pause mor then a few mins starts that whole mission bk over! I lov it and a no brainer but there r a few things I think that can definatly b explained mor in tutorial lile the light u onpy see w camera where your mission is bonds and also how in the world do u collect the one in the box high up done everything and stuck but really fun and with a few mor explaining things n tutorial and readon it just freezes up and it’s at the end of the mission too when u r almost finished it wil b a fun and really cool game!! Ty devs any feedbk wpuld b great and mayb update soon plz 🥴😬

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you so much for playing and for the awesome feedback! 🥰 We are really sorry the game freezes on you in the 3rd part. We are looking into it, but it would really help us if you could email us at info@sylphelabs.com with exactly what you were doing when it stalled!

Also, thanks for the notes on the tutorial! For the box high up: you are not stuck, you just missed a specific action to do nearby😉 Feel free to email us or join our Discord (https://discord.gg/snr3wtaeGk) if you want the full solution. We hope to get that update out soon!

reviews.review_title: Creepy and at the same time sweet
reviews.review_description: A nice game includes different genres and creepy and puzzles and a little shooter and looks very nice, should be like to different age groups

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review! We’re really glad you enjoyed the game. Happy to hear it can appeal to different age groups too!

reviews.review_description: Played for about an hour and am digging it.  I am a huge fan of Luigi's Mansion and Ghost Busters, this has that charm.  Can't wait to see what more the game has to offer.  Great job Dev's 👏

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you so much for the 5-star review! 👻 Hearing that our game captures that classic Luigi's Mansion and Ghostbusters charm is honestly the best compliment we could ever ask for. We are thrilled that you're digging the atmosphere! We are working hard on the upcoming content, and we can't wait for you to see what's next. Thanks for supporting our indie game!
